name: marktab
description: A fast, clear, privacy-friendly bookmark new tab extension.

scripts.package: npm run validate && mkdir -p dist && rm -f dist/marktab-*.zip && zip -X -r dist/marktab-$npm_package_version.zip manifest.json newtab.html newtab.js styles.css popup.html popup.js icons/icon16.png icons/icon32.png icons/icon48.png icons/icon128.png
